review_title: Great login application
description: Its a good system, that assisted us with monitoring the logs of our organization The dashboards were very informative to our management
author: Ilya P.
pros: We loved that it was a centralized place to mange our security logs We used it also to analize the data coming from these logs and create dashboards from the data
cons: The UI can be improved, its not very easy to use, and it takes quite some time to learn. Also the price of it is quite high

review_title: A really Helpful Resource to query Application Logs
description: I used splunk to query the application logs in a past job I had a couple of years ago. It served me pretty good, I would say.
author: Vinicius L.
pros: Splunk has an amazing user interface. It's pretty easy to find what we need on it. Its correlation_id resource is just fantastic.
cons: Occasionally its search didn't work so week for me.

review_title: Powerful Data Insights at a Premium Cost
description: It’s a robust and flexible platform that delivers powerful insights from large volumes of data, but it requires a learning curve and careful cost management as usage grows.
author: Gary T.
pros: Splunk Enterprise offers powerful real-time search and analytics, making it easy to troubleshoot and monitor complex systems.
cons: Splunk Enterprise can become very expensive at scale, especially with high data volumes and long retention periods.

review_title: Great for Logging only!
description: Splunk is a great Log streaming and Analytics tool. Could do better if has more to offer on the APM and Digital Experience monitoring realms of Observability.
author: Vaibhav S.
pros: Best in class Log analytics and real time log event monitoring. Friendly UI for all types of users. Quick dashboards with query insights in background.
cons: Not presented as a holistic Observability platform for all needs, with focus more around logging pipelines only. A bit of strategic confusion after acquisition.

review_title: SPLUNK THE LOG COLLECTING AND CORRELATION PLATFOR FOR YOUR DATACENTER
description: The overall experience was good. The services I need to handle had the need of such tools expecially for maintaining the compliance to ISO27001 and NIS2 directive.
author: Stefano S.
pros: Splunk is a great platform widely used for log collecting and management but also for implementing some security tools necessary for hardening the cyber security of your company.The main feature I liked is the log collecting that can collect from virtually any IT device and can correlate events for rendering easy the investigating during some security event.
cons: Splunk is a great log management and security platform the ony think I did'nt like is the price compared to others. However it has so many features that the price is right.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Intuitive workflow
description: Overall, Splunk Enterprise is meeting the needs of my projects. The dashboard is quite intuitive and engaging. It is also easy to navigate, making project move smoothly.
author: Adewale S.
pros: Splunk Enterprise provides me with great valie for money when compared with other software applications. Till moment, i received the support i need when required and in a good time too. It's quite easy to use and date is well managed to give more accurate predictions.
cons: At present, Splink Enterprise has not been giving any issues. My team seldom complains about the cost but when i make features comparison with its contemporaries, i could factually conclude that using Splunk Enterprise is a great deal.

review_title: Robust, Scalable Analytics for Modern Enterprises
author: Christine C.
pros: What I liked most about Splunk Enterprise is its powerful real-time search and analytics. It turns complex machine data into clear insights, with customizable dashboards and strong alerting that keeps teams proactive.
cons: What I dislike about Splunk Enterprise is the steep learning curve, especially for new users working with SPL, and performance tuning can require dedicated expertise.

review_title: 3 Years Splunk admin and giving a 5 star for the Splunk Enterprise!
description: I have Splunk forwarder installed over 100 servers to have logs sending over to Splunk Enterprise server, and the data ingest is very reliable. data query is also very fast and Dashboard is easy to build, alerts sending from Splunk SMTP server is reliable.
author: Philip Y.
pros: Easy setup and the search speed is fast, very reliable to ingest data. Dashboard is powerful, but building a fancy dashboard takes time, the Splunk community is a good resource.
cons: Price is a little bit high. The community feather is good though, I can find useful info from it. I wish the support can be easier.

review_title: Impactful and productive
description: Amazing and gives a lot of impact. After the integration, the support from splunk team is very good and gives a lot of edge.
author: Suraj D.
pros: It’s definitely value for money and the impact is very high. You can increase the productivity due to this.
cons: It is a bit complex and needs time to learn. Splunk integration is complicated and need expert advise.

review_title: splunk review
author: ville P.
pros: The "Schema-on-Read" Flexibility, Search Processing Language (SPL), Real-Time Dashboards & Visualizations, Massive Scalability
cons: High and Unpredictable Costs, Steep Learning Curve, High Administrative Overhead, Performance Degradation at Scale
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Splunk review
description: I am using this tools since long time and overall it’s good tool.
author: Dharmendra T.
pros: Capabilities and features of the tools provided are useful
cons: This is one of the costly tools Available in the market

review_title: Splunk Enterprise is my go-to for analyzing large volumes of data quickly and effectively.
author: Francisco S.
pros: The software is user-friendly and has powerful data visualization tools.
cons: I wish the pricing was more affordable for small businesses like mine, and some features can be overwhelming for beginners.

review_title: I use Splunk Enterprise to analyze and visualize data for better decision-making.
author: Alexia F.
pros: Splunk Enterprise has powerful search capabilities and customizable dashboards.
cons: The learning curve for setting up queries can be steep, and the pricing can be high for smaller teams.

review_title: Bettering Cybersecurity With Splunk Enterprise
author: Lilian K.
pros: It has amazing firewall protection features It makes handling security monitoring and improving networks security easy log monitoring is easy
cons: No regrets as Splunk Enterprise meets needs.

review_title: A powerful log aggregation solution with immensely useful tools built-in for popular applications.
author: Gabe M.
pros: - Free to use for small 500MB or less daily ingress, quite nice for small use cases and learning - No development work required to deploy and provide value. - Deployment flexibility: client agents are available to use, or clientless configurations for multiple OS platforms. It's also very easy to deploy, not just flexible. its a very simple affair. - Segmentation of logs: You can create separate instances of of logs to aggregate, based on organization needs. And those instances can have their own individual storage policies to optimize consumption of storage resources. - Configuration design: Thoughtful and mature documentation and design of the application regarding enterprise-class scaling on network storage. -POWERFUL tools: The user interface lends itself to learning more about your organization from the logs you collect, through metrics of trends of the logs being gathered. There are also specific modules/add-ons for popular applications to provide more value and event-based monitoring, all without having to develop in-house dashboards and intelligence of those logs. - Customization: You can create your own queries of logs, and event-based alerts. - Web-based GUI that clean is powerful - Sales/Technical Reps are top notch in fielding questions and evaluating environment for deployment. They were extremely helpful in helping our organization develop procedures and scaling our environment for expansion with our existing infrastructure.
cons: - Price: This product is not free for more than the minimal use. Pricing can be very expensive, relative to open source offerings. That is the trade-off you pay for not having in-house development of open source offerings. As this product is priced based on gigabytes of indexed logs, it is important to understand the scope of licensing necessary for your environment to determine if it is a good fit for your organization. - Watch your saved queries and hardware resources: Users have the ability to create and save queries. Like in database queries, some are more efficient than others. Large inefficient queries can be very resource-intensive. If you notice slowness in day-to-day queries, or navigation in the UI, or resource use in contention, keep an eye on saved queries and user practices.

review_title: Powerful SIEM system that meets our expectations.
description: We are using Splunk Enterprise for log correlation, the analytics are accurate and it catches errors right away which improves our internal capabilities, it is a special service that collects data from different data sources very accurately to catch future issues, the reports are detailed and understandable. It has features that streamline manual work, improve our security and our protection in our IT infrastructure.
author: Idaly M.
pros: I really like the platform, the data collection is ideal and the reports are detailed, it is the most appropriate SIEM service to monitor our IT infrastructure, it is an ideal software to take preventive measures, it is easy to customize the dashboards, the monitoring is constant and it gives us security in real time, the alerts are accurate and it helps us understand what is happening and fix it before it becomes serious.
cons: It is a somewhat expensive service but with more powerful features than other free SIEM systems, and it is a bit complex to set up and use for inexperienced users, so a lot of help should be sought from experienced staff and support team at first.

review_title: Splunk for Log Monitoring
description: Splunk is best data monitoring and visualization tool. We can set alert for log and monitor log . It provides different modes for searching Fast, Smart and verbose. By using Splunk we are getting all system log in one place .Splunk has capability to handle large and big size data. It has best GUI , one can easily adopt and do customization and based on requirments.
author: vikram S.
pros: We are using Splunk for log monitoring . It is integrated with Kubernetes and pivot cloud via data bus. By Splunk we get Realtime log application. It provides best visualization of data generated by system. Splunk also provide option to filter data based on data range and time. We can configure email alert for specific issue. Splunk also provide ML model for data. Splunk use simple query to get data ,everyone can easily learn Splunk query.
cons: I haven't found any issue yet the only problem with Splunk I have that log in Splunk is scattered . We need to build good query or better logging mechanism at application side.

review_title: Splunk: A Monitoring Tool for all your needs
description: If i have put a word it would say "Fantastic". The functionalities Splunk provides eases team to manage/monitor their IT infrastructure and internal application you will be well aware about the performance of your applications. Setup alerting and take necessary actions in stipulated time to overcome all the issues which may affect your application performance.
author: Sachin S.
pros: Splunk offers various features whether you need to setup monitoring on your server, application logs based on logs ingestion set alerts so that teams got notified on real time and take actions accordingly. In this way, it helps to monitor application which are mission critical. You can make dashboards in Splunk where you can configure various components such indexes, data inputs and schedule reports as well. To achieve additional functionalities we can install third party apps as well such as AWS Add on for cloud watch log ingestion.
cons: From Admin perspective, I found user access management a little difficult. The roles of access management becomes complicated because some time the config files for that didn't came very handy. Other then that I think all in all Splunk provides fulfill all of the requirements.

review_title: Splunk is a lifesaver!
description: It’s been wonderful. I was able to take most of my forwarded lambdas and charts them to watch duration and throughput. Notifications and alerts let me know if things are out of whack. Such a relief to know Splunk is watching my back!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: If you need real-time grokking into your infrastructure, look no further than Splunk. I love love love the dashboards. It’s easy to tell a story with your data, and the live search is so FAST!
cons: SPL is a little hard to get used to, but once you get the hang of it, it’s not so bad. I recommend downloading their community edition for some great examples of queries and dashboards.

review_title: really true nice monitoring tool if its nice implemented
description: For me it is a very good experience. It is necessary to develop a good implementation of IT INC Management
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It helped me enormously in my job as IT INC Management including detailed reports and alerting any necessary information.
cons: It has a somewhat complex paring curve and there are no simple tutorials or parallel design of tutorials for new managers

review_title: One of the best monitoring solutions for different platform.
author: Surabhi M.
pros: Best tracking and data analysis tool which help to monitor and manage the server and system component in very effective way. Real time Visualization helps to take the quick decision so that desired action can be taken to avoid failure.Best data collection in the forms of log and which helps to define the best set of automation jobs to fix the issue.
cons: There are few components or observation like,1. most of the time observes the slowness in the performance.2. Sometime observe the delay in the issue or updated log reflection on the portal. 3. Need more storage to manage and maintain the lo g which impact organizational costing and budget.

review_title: Splunk Enterprise Review
description: Scanning for known and unknown vulnerabilities on network to detect and remediate threats.
author: Ronnie B.
pros: With Splunk Enterprise, it is easy to investigate, detect and remediate threats on devices and endpoints on our network.
cons: It was full of technical overheads when we were customizing Splunk Enterprise features.

review_title: A valuable SIEM tool that aids Cyber defences
description: Overall a rather good experience based on the Customer Service we receive and the extent to which they make our use of the tool a good experience
author: Jason C.
pros: The saying "you only get out what you put in" is rather apt when utilising Splunk as a SIEM tool - i.e. the more logs / data you can feed into the solution the better the results. Ingesting multiple log files from numerous systems / applications is essential when reviewing security incidents and ensures everything is in one place.
cons: For all that is good with Splunk, the costs are rather high and could force Customers to other solutions unless they make themselves more competitive in the pricing market

review_title: Manipulate You Data
description: Splunk is widely used for manipulation of data and we encounter the use of this tool almostl twice a week. Even though it costs much more but still we have not found any alternative that is able to offer all these functionalities.
author: Divyang S.
pros: Splunk is very easy to use due to high community support and many video tutorials available online for new users to learn. Functionalities are robust and simple to use. Data retrieval and visualisation is nice and easy if you know the right querying process. Machine Learning supports enhances performance for the cloud, especially. It collect wide variety of data and still it amaze you the way it retrievs it.
cons: There are many tools available in market which are potential competitors of this tool and that too at reasonable pricing. Splunk offers more functionalities but costs you too much if you look at the work it does. Complex queries may require large CPU usage and may even freeze or atleast slow down the system for a while. Need to be specific while querying the data.

review_title: Splunk is a critical tool for monitoring and alerting
description: Splunk is a great product for enterprise monitoring and alerting.
author: Vince C.
pros: They have a robust platform that I have used for monitoring and analytics. There are a lot of options and customization available when using it.
cons: Because there is so much customization and options available, it can be complicated to learn.
